title: breynia macrantha
intro: Breynia macrantha, also known as the great nettle tree or great nettle vine, is a species of flowering plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant has been found to have potential health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and promoting wound healing. Breynia macrantha can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for its medicinal uses, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
